title: OFSI General licence INT/2025/5810196
body: " OFSI General licence - INT/2025/5810196 OFSI General licence - INT/2025/5810196 Publication notice   On 12 February 2025, OFSI issued General Licence INT/2025/5810196 under all the Syria (Sanctions) (EU Exit) Regulations 2019 (the Syria Regulations) which allows for payments to be made in respect of relevant humanitarian assistance activities. "
